```json
[
  {
    "idea": "EV Charger Network Expansion Acceleration",
    "family": "macro_input_pressure",
    "data": {
      "source": "OpenChargeMap API daily charger location counts by state/region",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "daily",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "Rapid week-over-week growth in publicly available EV charging locations signals infrastructure investment momentum and policy acceleration, typically preceding EV sales surges.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLI",
      "rationale": "Industrial manufacturing and installation of charging infrastructure drives equipment, construction, and logistics demand."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If weekly net new charger locations exceed 200-unit threshold above trailing 4-week average",
      "exit": "Exit after 10 trading days or if growth falls below 150-unit weekly pace",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "EV infrastructure deployment is steady and continuous; weekly threshold breaches occur multiple times per quarter."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Earthquake Aftershock Insurance Claims Spike",
    "family": "local_economy_weirdness",

      "source": "USGS earthquake API daily magnitude 4.0+ events by region with historical comparison",
      "type": "api",

      "stable": true

    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLF",
      "rationale": "Insurance and reinsurance companies see claim volume spikes; financial sector benefits from short-term repricing of risk premiums."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If 3+ magnitude 4.0+ earthquakes occur within 7 days in same region (e.g., California, Pacific Northwest)",
      "exit": "Exit after 8 trading days or if no additional earthquakes occur in next 5 days",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "monthly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Seismic activity is unpredictable but frequent enough that multi-event clusters occur several times per year in active zones."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Weather-Driven Utility Demand Spike",
    "family": "macro_input_pressure",

      "source": "Open-Meteo daily temperature and humidity for major US metros; compare to 10-year seasonal norms",
      "type": "api",

      "stable": true

    "behavior": "Extreme heat or cold days significantly above/below seasonal average drive peak electricity and natural gas demand, improving utility operating margins and signaling commodity pressure.",

      "direction": "bullish",

      "rationale": "Peak demand days increase revenue and earnings potential for utility operators; commodity hedges also improve pricing power."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If temperature deviation exceeds +15°F or -15°F from 10-year daily average in 3+ major metros simultaneously",

    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "daily",

    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Seasonal temperature extremes occur regularly; winter and summer spike seasons guarantee multiple triggering events per month."
  },
  {
    "idea": "FRED Unemployment Rate Surprise Downside",
    "family": "labor_jobs",

      "direction": "bullish",

      "entry": "If reported UNRATE is ≥0.2% lower than consensus forecast and prior month reading",

    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",

  },
  {

  },
  {
    "idea": "Tech Sector Volatility Crush Reversal Play",
    "family": "attention_sentiment",

      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLK",

    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If XLK 20-day realized volatility drops below 70% of 100-day baseline and closes near daily high",

    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Tech volatility cycles are frequent and predictable; complacency periods occur several times per quarter."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Bank Equity vs. Bond Spread Inversion Signal",
    "family": "macro_input_pressure",

      "source": "Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLF (financials ETF) and TLT (20-year Treasury ETF); calculate relative performance and yield curve proxy",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "daily",
      "stable": true

    "behavior": "When bank stocks dramatically outperform long-duration bonds while yield curve steepens, it signals inflation expectations rising and aggressive rate hike pricing that pressures financial system margins.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLF",
      "rationale": "Rapid bond selloffs combined with bank rallies often precede forced deleveraging as refinancing costs spike and credit spreads widen."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If XLF outperforms TLT by >3% over 5 trading days and TLT closes down >1.5% on the day",
      "exit": "Exit after 7 trading days or if performance spread narrows back to <1% over 3-day window",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Rate volatility spikes occur regularly; yield curve dynamics shift frequently enough to trigger entry conditions multiple times per month."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Materials Sector Commodity Pressure Washout",
    "family": "macro_input_pressure",

      "entry": "If both crude and gold fall >8% from 20-day highs within 10-day window and XLB closes at 20-day low",

    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "monthly",

    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
```
